description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stainless steel circular case with fixed bezel that has markingsDial style: Black, textured dial with steel toned, black and orange markings, steel toned hands with glow-in-the-dark feature and branding on the dialFeatures: Screw to reset the time, three face chronograph displayStrap style: Steel toned bracelet style strap with a butterfly closureWater resistance up to 100 mComes in a signature Timex Design caseWarranty: 1 year from date of purchase, against manufacturing defects
